conflict: Nick must hide his incompetence at coding while showcasing his visual expertise — one will get him caught, the other will get him hired
consequence: Outsider with a plan becomes an infiltrator with a badge — Nick is inside Canopy
must_land_beats: The coding portion as controlled disaster — memorized patterns barely holding
The image evaluation portion as revelation — Nick spots errors the answer key misses
The interviewer's confusion at the disconnect between coding weakness and visual brilliance
Nick sitting in the parking lot afterward, hands shaking

payoffs_to_land.description: Nick's trained visual intelligence pays off spectacularly in the evaluation section, catching anatomical and lighting errors no other candidate sees

pressure_source: Nick must hide his incompetence at coding while showcasing his visual expertise — one will get him caught, the other will get him hired
state_shift: Outsider with a plan becomes an infiltrator with a badge — Nick is inside Canopy
